title: buddleja veitchiana
intro: Buddleja veitchiana, also known as the butterfly bush, is a flowering plant species in the genus Buddleja, characterized by its long, conical panicles of small, fragrant flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Buddleja veitchiana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
